'''zobapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:caboched|caboched]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caboched|caboched]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zobapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobapithi|zobapithi]] || [[word:zobapiji|zobapiji]] || [[word:zobapishi|zobapishi]] || [[word:zobapiki|zobapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobaputhuthu|zobaputhuthu]] || [[word:zobapujuju|zobapujuju]] || [[word:zobapushushu|zobapushushu]] || [[word:zobapukuku|zobapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobaputhu|zobaputhu]] || [[word:zobapuju|zobapuju]] || [[word:zobapushu|zobapushu]] || [[word:zobapuku|zobapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobapufthuf|zobapufthuf]] || [[word:zobapufjuf|zobapufjuf]] || [[word:zobapufshuf|zobapufshuf]] || [[word:zobapufkuf|zobapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobapethe|zobapethe]] || [[word:zobapeje|zobapeje]] || [[word:zobapeshe|zobapeshe]] || [[word:zobapeke|zobapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobapothotho|zobapothotho]] || [[word:zobapojojo|zobapojojo]] || [[word:zobaposhosho|zobaposhosho]] || [[word:zobapokoko|zobapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobapotho|zobapotho]] || [[word:zobapojo|zobapojo]] || [[word:zobaposho|zobaposho]] || [[word:zobapoko|zobapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobapofthof|zobapofthof]] || [[word:zobapofjof|zobapofjof]] || [[word:zobapofshof|zobapofshof]] || [[word:zobapofkof|zobapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfthÃŸf|zobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfjÃŸf|zobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfshÃŸf|zobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfkÃŸf|zobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfthÃŸf|zobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfjÃŸf|zobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfshÃŸf|zobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfkÃŸf|zobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfthÃŸf|zobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfjÃŸf|zobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfshÃŸf|zobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zobapÃŸfkÃŸf|zobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobapÃḊthÃḊ|zobapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zobapÃḊjÃḊ|zobapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zobapÃḊshÃḊ|zobapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zobapÃḊkÃḊ|zobapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobapathatha|zobapathatha]] || [[word:zobapajaja|zobapajaja]] || [[word:zobapashasha|zobapashasha]] || [[word:zobapakaka|zobapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobapatha|zobapatha]] || [[word:zobapaja|zobapaja]] || [[word:zobapasha|zobapasha]] || [[word:zobapaka|zobapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobapafthaf|zobapafthaf]] || [[word:zobapafjaf|zobapafjaf]] || [[word:zobapafshaf|zobapafshaf]] || [[word:zobapafkaf|zobapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zobapasha|zobapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobapshÃḋsha|zobapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobaprosha|zobaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobapmusha|zobapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobapyasha|zobapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobapnkshÃḋsha|gozobapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobapnkrosha|gozobapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobapnkmusha|gozobapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobapnkyasha|gozobapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zobabapasha|zobabapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobabapshÃḋsha|zobabapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobabaprosha|zobabaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobabapmusha|zobabapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobabapyasha|zobabapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobabapnkshÃḋsha|gozobabapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobabapnkrosha|gozobabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobabapnkmusha|gozobabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobabapnkyasha|gozobabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zebÃḊpasha|zebÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zebÃḊpshÃḋsha|zebÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zebÃḊprosha|zebÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zebÃḊpmusha|zebÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zebÃḊpyasha|zebÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gozebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozebÃḊpnkrosha|gozebÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozebÃḊpnkmusha|gozebÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozebÃḊpnkyasha|gozebÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zobfapasha|zobfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobfapshÃḋsha|zobfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobfaprosha|zobfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobfapmusha|zobfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobfapyasha|zobfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobfapnkshÃḋsha|gozobfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobfapnkrosha|gozobfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobfapnkmusha|gozobfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobfapnkyasha|gozobfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
